Crested Mistmoore Shield  
 

Lore Item Placeable
Slot: SECONDARY
AC: 10
This item can be used in tradeskills.
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
DEX: +6
SV DISEASE: +10 SV MAGIC: +10 SV POISON: +10
WT: 6.5 Size: MEDIUM
Class: WAR CLR PAL RNG SHD DRU BRD ROG SHM
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

I remember in the first year of eq. My pally had this + Ghoulbane. And full valorium. + Fbss + Hooded-black cloak + Sunderfury to top it off.

▲ Page top
nice
QuoteReply
# Jun 02 2003 at 3:04 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591789465264
13 posts
LvL 40 barbarian shaman here.

I've been using this shield since lvl 30. Great shield, nice graphic, great resists.

The price on these seems to fluctuate a lot though. I've seen them going for as high as 450pp. 225pp is about average though, so the pricing is correct.
▲ Page top
RE: nice
QuoteReply
# Nov 07 2003 at 2:26 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591788761624
View User Forum
15 posts
i got mine for 90pp....
▲ Page top
Which is better?
QuoteReply
# Jan 15 2003 at 9:26 AM Rating: Decent
animekenji
1,123 posts
I have a chance to upgrade one of my lowbies Shiny Brass Shield and can't decide whether to get this, or a Crustacean Shell Shield. I know the AC and stat buffs on the Crusty are better, but I really like the resist buffs on this one, which is why I can't decide. I can get either for about the same price, so that isn't a concern. I am upgrading a Wood Elf Ranger if that makes much of a difference.
____________________________
If you were me and I were you, would we still be friends?
▲ Page top
RE: Which is better?
QuoteReply
# Jan 15 2003 at 7:22 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592344474330
Sage
3,705 posts
get a clay guardian. the ac and HP will help more than the resists, at the level a ranger actually uses a shield.

When higher level, if you want a shield for resists and bashing against casters, upgrade to a sarnak battle shield.
▲ Page top
RE: Which is better?
QuoteReply
# Mar 06 2003 at 12:30 AM Rating: Decent
animekenji
1,123 posts
When higher level, if you want a shield for resists and bashing against casters, upgrade to a sarnak battle shield.


Only problem with that theory is rangers don't bash as far as I know.
____________________________
If you were me and I were you, would we still be friends?
▲ Page top
this is an awesome shield!
QuoteReply
# Dec 10 2002 at 10:24 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591768551941
78 posts
i got this on a mid lvl guild raid in mistmoore, and i currently have it equipped on my shaman who is in the crushbone TR. this is a great SVs shield against the orc oracles, and it looks awesome too. leant it to a pally friend who needed svs and he only got DoTed once while we were in there. i would highly suggest picking one up for either a pally or shaman.

http://www.magelo.com/eq_view_profile.html?num=453722
▲ Page top
Good Pally Shield
QuoteReply
# Sep 13 2002 at 5:24 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591781502536
6 posts
Rood Paladin Shield the SV Magic really helps and i bought it for 250 at bazaar. Better than my old Shiny Brass Shield.

Confirm Spawn
QuoteReply
# Aug 05 2002 at 7:05 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593362115203
13 posts
I've ben Soloing and grouping in the zone for the past 4 days. Saw this guy for the first time on the right side of the pond and he had the shield out. this being the first time I've seen it out I jumped him and He went down easy. Nice stas for a mid lev char.
▲ Page top
Spawn at Pond
QuoteReply
# Jul 08 2002 at 7:30 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592759447592
2 posts
My brother and I were pulling to ramp when a glyphed ghoul spawned right beside lake with one. We pounced on him as soon as we spotted him. It was our 3rd day straight being there so they are not common. Nice shield though.

▲ Page top
Shield
QuoteReply
# Nov 10 2001 at 8:43 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591771236046
32 posts
This is a nice shield. I'd always seen twinks running around with them before, and I was at the front of Mistmoore when i saw a glyphed ghoul with this shield on it, and it was yellow to me at 25 so i said what the hey. /g Attack a glyphed ghoul he has shield! Needless to say we killed him and I lost the roll for it. I guess you'll find this on them randomly, but they should have it equipped. I'm not sure where glyphed ghoul spawns (i thought ghouls were ghouls, not dark elves hehe), he was by the pool. Probably from a train, seeing as to how there's a train there about every 5 minutes. Man those deathly harbringers are annoying hehe.
▲ Page top
RE: Shield
QuoteReply
# Dec 06 2001 at 6:05 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592252589012
4 posts
I believe the ghouls spawn in the Grave yard and just outside the Grave Yard. Sometimes they spawn near the pond, but I've never seen one spawn there with the shield, but obviously they do on occassion spawn there with the shield.

JUst was in MM tonight and i seen one pop with it near the pool well we jumped it and after all the adds we won well gess what i lost the roll it seem i never get the rolls i like to get :) now i'm on a mission to get one of them shelds for my self :)

14 posts
I just got one of these sheild's. I am a wiz and dont have any use for it..I would like to sell it but dont know what the worth is.. Could someone give me a PC on this sheild.. I am on the Xegony server my name is Aarrudyen. if your on this server give me a tell and let me know what its worth. please..Or post it here.. thank you

RE: What is the worth
QuoteReply
# May 07 2003 at 9:30 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591781101573
View User Forum
Scholar
161 posts
thew shield is not that awesome but plainly nice and for the lvls mm is intended it's even very nice. On the other hand, if you can otain the materials and a troll mastersmithy (trophee preferred) let them transfer it into hatefull/vengefull/fearfull shield. Now the stats are way up for the line of 50's. And sell it after the upgrade for big pp if you can't use it. If you got the money to spare to take the risk that is...
▲ Page top
Fighting evil eyes
QuoteReply
# Sep 17 2001 at 11:15 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592344474330
Sage
3,705 posts
Slap one of these in your hand, an SSB on your head, and get a cleric to buff your magic resists, and Voila, a warrior who doesn't get charmed by every evil eye in town (at least sometimes). Magic resist is critical when fighting mobs who charm.
▲ Page top
RE: Fighting evil eyes
QuoteReply
# Mar 09 2002 at 2:12 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591771236046
32 posts
Do not forget the Bloodstained mantle for an extra 10 Save vs. Magic. It's cheap too. And if you're going to buy one of those, buy a splitpaw hide mask too for it's 5 magic resist. And if you're rich go ahead and buy mithril greaves and vambraces for their 5 magic resist each too. That will show those evil eyes who is boss!
▲ Page top
not bad
QuoteReply
# Sep 04 2001 at 7:35 AM Rating: Decent

▲ Page top
Outdated
QuoteReply
# Jul 06 2001 at 11:37 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1592757126365
9 posts
The picture of the item and stats is outdated, the shield has been changed to Lore status. It is deffinately a good shield for paladins. The CDS is good for weaker paladins and such and is a little easier to get ahold of. Keep in mind that most paladins start using 2HS because thats what our epic is. I personally only change to 1HS if I am fighting undead or casters. The bash interupts spells and the resistances the shield adds makes this a nice choice.
▲ Page top
trade
QuoteReply
# Jun 29 2001 at 11:42 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591750570158
2 posts
i traded this for a noble's robe, was it a fair trade?
▲ Page top
RE: trade
QuoteReply
# Jul 01 2001 at 5:01 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591750607099
121 posts
Yeah i think it was a fair trade. The Noble's robes on the Saryrn server go for something like prolly 800-1200pp so you did a good deal. The Noble's robe is also nice for Enchanters as it has a 5cha boost and the resists add up nicely :)
Have fun w/ your robe!
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Jun 18 2001 at 10:34 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) read the subject )

▲ Page top
great paladin shield
QuoteReply
# Feb 11 2001 at 4:47 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591753564728
2 posts
This shield works great paired with a Ghoulbane, the extra dex helps the sword proc a lot more, plus with the undead you'll encounter, the SV vs magic, disease, and poisen really helps a paladin's defense.
▲ Page top
RE: great paladin shield
QuoteReply
# Feb 11 2001 at 4:26 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Aye good point, or a Cracked Darkwood Shield so they can hit harder (9str). If I had to choose between the two, depending on what race of Paladin I chose I would probably go for the Mistmoore shield (much easier to find then then CDS). However, if I picked a High Elf Pally, I would go for STR (their STR is pretty bad, they need the help, heh). Thats just me anyway :)
▲ Page top
RE: great paladin shield
QuoteReply
# Sep 16 2002 at 12:02 AM Rating: Decent
sarongor
View User Forum
Scholar
140 posts
Don't forget, High-elf pallies DEX sucks big time also. It's fairly easy to get STR up but it's hard to find DEX gear that does not sacrifice AC. So if you need a shield to go with your GB, this is a good choice.
▲ Page top
RE: great paladin shield
QuoteReply
# Feb 14 2001 at 9:22 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
your forgeting one small but very important thing....... the server you are playing on......... PvP?..... go for the DEX.... this is a good shield till you get to the planes

Violas --- Tallon Zak
